metrics.narrative: Monroe's stated business problem is that sourcing and procurement are fully manual with no system in place, and the account wants to move to a structured three-bids-to-buy process (Customer_Business_Problem__c, entered at qualification 18 May 2026). Value_to_Customer__c frames the benefit as standardized sourcing, automated bid comparison, and reduced manual effort, but neither figure is quantified and nothing is buyer-quoted, since no Avoma meeting exists for this opportunity through opp ID, account ID, or either buyer's email. This is a specific, plausible starting point, not boilerplate, but it stops short of a confirmed, buyer-voiced business case.

champion.narrative: X10b_Champion_Business_Buyer__c is blank and no contact shows any sign of advocacy. Both known contacts, Nona MCIPS and Maria Camarre, have gone unresponsive to five rep outreach touches since 18 May 2026 (3, 11, 19, 29 Jun and 7 Jul 2026, per Next_Step_History__c). There is no champion on this deal at this time.

competition.narrative: Competitors__c names Coupa, GEP (recorded in the field as 'GEP Worldwide'), and JAGGAER. Why_not_Zycus__c separately notes a risk that Monroe 'might consider point solutions or cheaper alternatives since it will be their first step into procurement automation.' No call, quote, or context exists anywhere on how Monroe is actually evaluating these three, whether a bake-off is underway, or whether one is preferred. The competitive read is a bare field entry, not live intelligence.

identify_pain.narrative: The pain is specific: fully manual sourcing and procurement with no system in place, and a desire to support a structured three-bids-to-buy process (Customer_Business_Problem__c). This reads as genuine discovery output rather than a generic template, most likely captured around the 18 May 2026 qualification conversation. However, no transcript or completed-task record independently corroborates it in this sweep, since zero Avoma meetings exist for this opportunity through any discovery path (opp ID, account ID, or either buyer email).

paper_process.narrative: Compelling_Event__c describes an 'active procurement solution research project, though it is still in very early stages,' with the team just beginning to evaluate module fit. No RFP has been released despite repeated rep requests for the release timeline (Next_Step_History__c entries on 11 and 29 Jun 2026), no buyer-confirmed date exists, and no paper process of any kind has started.

economic_buyer.narrative: Executive_Sponsor_Identified__c and Decision_Maker_Identified__c are both explicitly false, and Decision_Maker_Name_Title__c is blank. The only two contacts on the opportunity, Nona MCIPS (Procurement Leader) and Maria Camarre (Project Procurement Specialist), are logged as Evaluators, not budget owners, and neither is shown to have escalated this to anyone senior. No economic buyer has been identified or engaged anywhere in this record.

decision_process.narrative: Purchase_approvals_Required_from__c, Multiple_approvals__c, and Does_the_Buyer_need_approval__c are all blank, and no call describes who signs off on a purchase like this. The account record lists a CFO, a second CFO-titled contact, and a General Counsel, none of whom have been connected to this opportunity's approval chain in any source read.

decision_criteria.narrative: Business_Requirements__c is blank and Shoe_Fit_Criteria_Met__c is false. No call or task describes what Monroe will use to judge vendors, so there is no way to know whether price, functionality, implementation speed, or something else will decide this.

deal_scores_evidence.summary: This is an early, largely unengaged deal. It was qualified on 18 May 2026 off a specific, plausible pain statement, but nothing has advanced since: no economic buyer, no champion, no RFP, and zero verified two-way buyer contact in over seven weeks despite five rep outreach touches.

deal_risk.text: Close date (21 Aug 2026, 43 days out) is not achievable given zero discovery call, no RFP, and no champion; a realistic enterprise motion needs 4 to 6 months from RFP release alone.

Single-threaded on two mid-level Evaluators with no budget authority, both unresponsive since 18 May 2026; eighteen other named account contacts, including a COO and two CFO-titled leaders, have never been engaged on this opportunity.
Competitive blind spot: three named rivals with zero intelligence on how Monroe is evaluating them or whether one is already preferred.

win_position.text: Buyer power is unmapped: Executive_Sponsor_Identified__c and Decision_Maker_Identified__c are both false, and neither known contact (Nona MCIPS, Maria Camarre) holds budget authority (OpportunityContactRole, pulled 9 Jul 2026).

Zero verified two-way buyer engagement exists since qualification: no Avoma call was found via opp ID, account ID, or either buyer email, and the only logged Task since 18 May 2026 is an unanswered outbound dial on 2 Jun 2026 (SF Task, Nooks call log).
Competitive picture is blind: Coupa, GEP, and JAGGAER are named in Competitors__c with no supporting call or quote on positioning, timing, or buyer preference.

The opportunity was qualified with a real, specific pain statement: Customer_Business_Problem__c describes fully manual sourcing and procurement and a desire for a structured three-bids-to-buy process, a concrete detail rather than boilerplate (entered at qualification, 18 May 2026).

deal_momentum.text: Deal has been quiet for over five weeks: LastActivityDate is 2 Jun 2026 with no confirmed buyer response since, and the rep's five outreach touches (3, 11, 19, 29 Jun and 7 Jul 2026) are all one-way (Next_Step_History__c).
Time in stage has run past typical cadence: the opportunity has sat in Qualified for 52 days (entered 18 May 2026) with no discovery call, demo, or RFP to show for it.
The rep is actively working the account: Grace Kim logged a plan on 7 Jul 2026 to loop in BD and multi-thread beyond the two silent contacts (Next_Step__c).

customer_commitment.text: No buyer-voiced preference or commitment exists in any source; both known contacts have not responded to five outreach attempts since 18 May 2026.

ai_positioning_strength.summary: No evidence exists of how Monroe views Zycus's AI capabilities (Merlin), since no discovery call or demo has occurred to discuss it.

customer_expectations_fit.summary: No criterion-level fit evidence exists; the buyer has not discussed evaluation criteria in any read source.
